name: raguardian-wordpress-client
description: Local WordPress test harness for the RAGuardian WordPress plugin.

scripts.wp:setup: wp-env run cli wp plugin activate rag-client
scripts.test: npm run test:lint && npm run test:php
scripts.test:e2e: npm run doctor && wp-env start && wp-env run cli wp plugin activate rag-client && playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:headed: npm run doctor && wp-env start && wp-env run cli wp plugin activate rag-client && playwright test --headed
scripts.test:e2e:debug: npm run doctor && wp-env start && wp-env run cli wp plugin activate rag-client && playwright test --debug
